Package com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.dto

Class ItemResponse

java.lang.Object
com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.dto.ItemResponse
public class ItemResponse extends Object
Response object representing a stored NASA media item. Returned when item data is requested.

    String
